data.title: Write RED tests for hook_record_agent_attribution
data.description: Create tests/hooks/test-post-functions-attribution.sh with two failing test functions: test_hook_record_agent_attribution_writes_jsonl_entry_when_enabled() and test_hook_record_agent_attribution_skips_write_when_disabled(). Tests must run in fresh subshells due to _POST_FUNCTIONS_LOADED=1 guard. Commit only the test file; CI fails (RED state — intended). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
